titleStmt.title: SII 24.233: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 233. (A.R. No. 27 of 1936-37.) SAME WALL.

summary.p: Records the sale of a garden-land to the bhaṭṭas by Aruḷāḷap-perumāḷ alias Piṟaguvāḷi Aḻagiyaperumāḷdāsaṉ, a dāsanambi of Tiruvaraṅgam-Tiruppati.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
komāṟapaṉmarāṉa tribhuvaṉaccakravattikaḷ śrīkulacekaratevarkku yāṇṭu varuṣam Iraṇṭāvatiṉ Etirāmāṇṭu makaranāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu tritiyaiyum cevvāyk kiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Uttirattu nāḷ teṉkarai pāṇṭikulapati vaḷanāṭṭu viḷānāṭṭu tiruvaraṅkan tiruppatiyil dāsanampimāril Aruḷāḷap perumāḷāṉa piṟakuvāḷi Aḻakiya perumāḷ dāsaṉeṉ tirunantavaṉa nilavilai pramāṇam . perumāḷ cuntara pāṇṭiyatevar tirunāmattāl Ivvūril vaitta Akaram kodaṇḍarāma ccaturvetimaṅka
lattu bhaṭṭakaḷukku Iṟṟaināḷāl viṟṟukkuṭutta tirunantavaṉamāvatu tirukkuṟaip paṟṟil teṉṉoḻukil Eṉṉutāna tirunantavaṉattukku Icainta kiḻpārkkellai nācciyār śrīraṅkanāyakiyār tirunantavaṉattukku meṟkum teṉpārkkellai maṉṟacca viḷākattu Ellaikku vaṭakkum melpārkkellai dāsanampimāril karumāṇikkāḻvārāṉa Aṇukkavillidāsaṉ tirunantavaṉattukku kiḻakkum vaṭapārk kellai tirumuṭikkuṟaikkup perumāḷ Eḻuntaruḷukiṟa tiruvitikkut teṟkum naṭuvu paṭṭa Eṉṉutāṉa tirunantavaṉam mikutikkuṟai Uṭpaṭa maranilai viḷainilamum Uṭpaṭa kiḻmel kol 6 Ittirunantavaṉaṅkol Āṟukkum
kol 1 kku ø 10 4 Āka Emmilicainta vilaipporuḷaṉṟāṭu vaḻaṅku nallirāci U 8 10 4 Ippaṇam Eṇpattu nālum Āvaṇakkaḷariye kāṭṭeṟṟik kaiccelavaṟak kaikkoṇṭu viṟṟu vilai pramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭutteṉ bhaṭṭakaḷukku piṟaku vāḷi Aḻakiya perumāḷdāsaṉeṉ Ippaṭi viṟṟukkuṭutta Ittirunantavaṉaṅkol Āṟil meṉokkiṉa maramum kiṇokkiṉa kiṇaṟum bhāgamum bhāgāśrayaṅkaḷum maṟṟum Epperppaṭṭa samastaprāptikaḷum Uṭpaṭa viṟṟu vilai pramāṇam paṇṇik kuṭutteṉ Ittirunantavaṉaṅkol Āṟukkum Ippaṇam Eṇpattu nālume vilaiyāvatākavum Ituve poruḷmā
vaṟutip poruṭ celavolai yāvatākavum Ituvallatu veṟu poruḷ māvaṟutip poruṭ celavolai kāṭṭavum kāṇavum kaṭavatallavākavum Ippaṭi cammatittu vilaikku viṟṟup poruḷaṟak kaikkoṇṭu viṟṟu vilai pramāṇam paṇṇik kuṭutteṉ bhaṭṭakaḷukkup piṟakuvāḷi Aḻakiyaperumāḷ dāsaṉeṉ Ippaṭi viṟṟuk kuṭutta pramāṇappaṭi mulliyamāṉa paṇam Eṇpattunālum bharatar pakkalile kaikkoḷḷukaiyil Ituve kraya dravyac celavu kaiyyīṭāvatākavum Ippaṭi cammatittu viṟṟu vilai pramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭutteṉ kodaṇḍarāmac caturvedimaṅkalattu bhaṭṭakaḷukkup piṟakuvāḷi Aḻakiya perumāḷeṉ .
Ippaṇam Eṇpattu nālukkum Ikkol Āṟum viṟṟukkuṭuttamaikku Ivai piṟaku vāḷi Aḻakiya perumāḷ dāsaṉ Eḻuttu § Itu talaiccaṅkāṭṭu Āyattevaṉ samjñaiyāṉamaikku Ivai maṅkainampi Eḻuttu § Ivarkaḷ Apekṣikka Ipramāṇam Eḻutiṉamaikku Ivai perumākkaḷur varatarāja bhaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu § Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ tiruccolaip piccaṉeṉ § Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ tirunaṟaiyūr dāsaṉeṉ § Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ paccaivāraṇadāsaṉeṉ § Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ tirumaṅkai
nampiyeṉ § Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ śrīvaikuntadāsaṉeṉ §
Digital edition of SII 24.233 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
